next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asks 'How much money did we make from the service line checklist rewrite and rollout pack since beginning of March 2026' with number only. Exhaustiveness: searched invoices for the service-line phrase and read all 4 matching invoice files (INV-0007, INV-0008, INV-0010, INV-0011). Date filter: since beginning of March 2026 => issued_on >= 2026-03-01, so include INV-0010 (2026-03-23, line_eur 780) and INV-0011 (2026-03-29, line_eur 390); exclude Dec/Jan matches. Arithmetic: 780 + 390 = 1170.
next_step.observation: Computed total matching line_eur since 2026-03-01 is 1170 from two March invoices.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in finance directories, and used line-item totals (not invoice totals) for service-line query.
function.outcome_justification: The exact line item 'checklist rewrite and rollout pack' appears in four invoices read. Only two are issued on/after 2026-03-01: INV-0010 line_eur 780 and INV-0011 line_eur 390; summed total is 1170.
